summary_one_line: Winner needs the literal header name 'Transfer-Encoding:' present so Curl_checkheaders returns non-NULL and the true branch is taken.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The input must contain the ASCII string 'Transfer-Encoding:' (or its case-insensitive header-name prefix) so that Curl_checkheaders(data, STRCONST("Transfer-Encoding")) at line 2398 returns a non-NULL pointer, making the if(ptr) gate at 2399 true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five value_profile_cmplog winner seeds embed the literal bytes 'Transfer-Encoding:' starting near offset 0x24 (47 54 72 61 6e 73 66 65 72 2d 45 6e 63 6f 64 69 6e 67 3a), so the header lookup matches and the W-only true-branch body (lines 2401-2404) executes.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile loser seeds carry only short repetitive byte runs (e.g. '%%%%' / '.././') with no 'Transfer-Encoding' substring, so Curl_checkheaders returns NULL, ptr is false, and execution falls into the L-only else branch at 2405.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator, which captures the runtime CMP operand 'Transfer-Encoding' (the constant Curl_checkheaders compares against) and substitutes it into the input, planting the exact header string that value_profile's havoc/CMP_MAP-only stack cannot synthesize.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the if(ptr) gate guarded by a Curl_checkheaders Transfer-Encoding lookup.
The globally blocked side is the true branch and only the winner takes it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L2399  T=6 F=0  T=0 F=10  if(ptr) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds contain the literal 'Transfer-Encoding:' bytes.
The header string continues with 'coding:' completing 'Transfer-Encoding:'.
Loser seeds carry repetitive non-header byte runs and no Transfer-Encoding substring.
The winner-only true-branch body executes Curl_compareheader, which the loser never reaches.
value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that the loser lacks.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 141 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed b8044d1b09c5ef1e`; chain of 41 ancestor levels with I2S-floor signal reporting 2 dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 39 and 40, the characteristic unwrapped I2SRandReplace find for vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating an if(ptr) on a Curl_checkheaders-style fixed-string header lookup where value_profile resolves the true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage).

weakest_evidence_point: The assumption that the Transfer-Encoding literal originated from I2S substitution rather than lucky havoc plus token-stack assembly, since the dash rows are at deep ancestor levels (39-40) not the leaf.
